404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: We couldn't find what you're looking for.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.description: You must be logged in to access this page.

403.title: Access Forbidden
403.description: You don’t have permission to view this page.

400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The request could not be processed due to invalid data.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.description: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: You're sending too many requests. Please slow down.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: The service is temporarily unavailable due to maintenance.

default.title: Unexpected Error
default.description: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
